industry: Information Technology,Administrative Management,Finance & Trade,Science & Education,Culture & Media

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Translate a 20-page document within 10 seconds: Pure text >=2 pages/second, mixed text and images >=1.5 pages/second
- Translation accuracy >=98.5%: Vertical terminology matching accuracy >=99%
- Supports translation across 100+ languages: Covers about 96% of the high-frequency languages used by enterprises
- Startup validation cost down 90%: Free quotas and open-source components can be used for rapid pilot projects

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Text translation is widely used in scenarios such as daily office work, cross-border business communication, research paper writing and reading, product localization, and multi-region distribution of operational content. It is a high-frequency rigid demand in industries such as information technology, finance and trade, science and education, and culture and media. In addition to translating text snippets, real business workflows also expect efficient translation solutions for editable document formats such as Word, PDF, and Markdown.

**Solution**: To address this, this example proposes an intelligent translation workflow that can be privately deployed. Based on the Gemini 3 Pro large model, which is currently at the SOTA level in overall translation capability, and combined with Gemini CLI and configurable prompt files, it implements an integrated translation workflow from text input and intelligent translation to quality evaluation and result output.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Administrative Management, Finance & Trade, Science & Education, Culture & Media
**Category**: Service, Operations, Management
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, MCP tools, Multilingual Learning, Machine Translation, API Integration

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency: When manually handling documents in multiple formats, users often need to repeatedly copy and paste content into translation tools. Translating a 20-page document can take 30-60 minutes, with a poor experience that makes it hard to support batch and high-frequency translation use cases
- High cost: Translation experts, especially for low-resource languages, are expensive and scarce, while professional translation software is costly and inflexible
- Inconsistent translation quality: Different translators vary in professional background and language habits, leading to inconsistent style and terminology and sometimes mistranslations or omissions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Flexible foundation model selection: The system supports switching among multiple foundation large models
- Multilingual translation support: The candidate foundation models recommended by the system all support multilingual translation, making configuration and use convenient

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading efficiency: Compared with manual workflows, the overall speed is improved by 20-180x, and a 20-page document can be completed in about 10 seconds.
- Stable quality: Translation accuracy >=98.5%, and terminology matching accuracy in science, finance, law, and similar domains >=99%.
- Broader coverage: Supports translation across 100+ languages and can meet the needs of most cross-regional business collaboration.
- Better cost profile: Automated translation and format preservation reduce manual translation, proofreading, and typesetting cost by about 80%.
